activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static intake readiness workspace for reviewing Avery Morgan's appointment packet, selecting the administrative action, and recording the handoff reason.
parsed.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f3f6f8;color:#18232d;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif}button,input,textarea{font:inherit}.intake-app{min-height:100vh;padding:24px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr) 340px;gap:18px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fafb 0%,#eef3f6 100%)}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8e0e7;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(24,35,45,.06)}.queue-panel,.action-panel{padding:16px}.review-panel{padding:0;overflow:hidden}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 6px;color:#607080;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.panel-title{margin:0;color:#101820;font-size:20px;line-height:1.2}.small{font-size:13px;color:#647383}.muted{color:#6b7886}.queue-list{display:grid;gap:10px;margin-top:16px}.queue-item{width:100%;text-align:left;background:#f8fafb;border:1px solid #dbe3ea;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;cursor:default}.queue-item.active{background:#eef7fb;border-color:#4f9bb9;box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #19789c}.queue-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;align-items:center}.queue-id{font-weight:700;color:#24313c}.queue-name{margin-top:4px;font-weight:700}.slot{color:#526170;font-size:13px}.status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:24px;border-radius:999px;padding:3px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.status.missing{background:#fff0df;color:#9a4b00}.status.verify{background:#e9f0ff;color:#3355a3}.status.ready{background:#e7f6ed;color:#237044}.review-header{padding:20px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid #e1e7ed;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px;align-items:flex-start}.case-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid #d7e0e8;border-radius:999px;background:#f7fafc;padding:5px 10px;font-size:13px;color:#344454}.content-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:18px;padding:20px 22px}.section{margin-bottom:18px}.section h2{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:16px;color:#18232d}.notice{border:1px solid #f0c98f;background:#fff8ed;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px}.notice strong{display:block;margin-bottom:4px;color:#8a4a0a}.checklist{display:grid;gap:10px}.check{display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr auto;gap:10px;align-items:start;border:1px solid #dfe7ee;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;background:#fff}.mark{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800}.done .mark{background:#e4f5eb;color:#1f7846}.blocked .mark{background:#fff0df;color:#9a4b00}.review .mark{background:#e9f0ff;color:#3355a3}.check-title{font-weight:700}.check-note{margin-top:3px;font-size:13px;color:#647383}.source-grid{display:grid;gap:8px}.source-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;border:1px solid #e2e9ef;border-radius:7px;padding:9px 10px;background:#fafcfd;font-size:13px}.source-row span:first-child{color:#5f6e7c}.source-row span:last-child{font-weight:700;text-align:right}.policy{background:#f4f7f9;border-left:4px solid #607d8b;border-radius:6px;padding:12px 14px;color:#344454;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45}.action-panel{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.decision-card{border:1px solid #dde5ec;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;background:#fff}.decision-card.selected{border-color:#19789c;background:#eef8fb}.radio-line{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-start;font-weight:700}.radio-line input{margin-top:2px}.reason-box{width:100%;min-height:112px;resize:none;border:1px solid #cfd9e2;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 11px;color:#24313c;background:#fbfdfe;line-height:1.4}.button-row{display:grid;gap:10px}.btn{border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:7px;padding:11px 12px;font-weight:800;text-align:center;background:#fff;color:#1f2d38}.btn.primary{background:#176b87;color:#fff}.btn.secondary{border-color:#b8c6d1;background:#fff}.btn.disabled{background:#edf1f4;color:#909aa4;border-color:#d5dde4}.handoff{border:1px solid #dce5ec;border-radius:8px;background:#fbfcfd;padding:12px}.handoff-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #e5ebf0}.handoff-row:last-child{border-bottom:0}.handoff-label{color:#607080;font-size:13px}.handoff-value{font-weight:700;text-align:right}.footer-note{font-size:12px;color:#6d7a86;line-height:1.4}@media (max-width:1100px){.intake-app{grid-template-columns:1fr}.content-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
parsed.html:
Clinical intake review

Administrative readiness

Review packets and choose the next administrative action.

Intake packet I-4471

Avery Morgan

New patient consult10:30 AM slotPending readiness review
Consent missing
Scheduling holdSigned consent is missing. Schedule only when required administrative forms are complete.

Administrative evidence

✓
Referral document
Referral document is uploaded and available for the intake packet.
Uploaded
i
Insurance card
Insurance card image is present. Escalate only if eligibility remains uncertain.
Present
!
Signed consent
Required signed consent form is missing before scheduling.
Missing

Policy boundary

Scheduling and intake administration only. Do not diagnose, triage, or recommend treatment.

Packet inputs

intake_packetI-4471
document fieldsConsent missing
eligibility statusCard image present
scheduling endpointNot submitted

Readiness result

Next actionReturn missing forms
ReasonSigned consent required
ScheduleBlocked

Administrative handoff

Choose next action

Current evidence supports returning the packet for signed consent.

Handoff reason

Administrative handoff records the action and reason only; clinical diagnosis, triage, and treatment recommendations are outside this review.
